div.style: flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;
color: #888; font-size: 13px; text-align: center; margin-top: 30px; line-height: 1.6;

t.div:
Describe the workflow you want to create.
e.g. "Send an email when a sale order is confirmed"

div.style: display: flex; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0; flex-shrink: 0; user-select: text;

input.style: flex: 1; border: none; padding: 12px 14px; outline: none; font-size: 13px; background: transparent; user-select: text; cursor: text;
